entry.title: Continue
entry.description: Open-source AI coding assistant for custom model routing, editor chat, autocomplete, and development workflows.
entry.seoDescription: Continue is an open-source AI coding assistant for editor chat, autocomplete, custom models, and coding workflows.
entry.author: Continue
entry.cardDescription: Open-source AI coding assistant with model control.
entry.body:
## Editorial notes

Continue is useful when teams need self-directed model choices, local configuration, and open-source control over AI coding workflows.

## Disclosure

Editorial listing. No paid placement or affiliate link is used.
